steps.title: Count each part type
steps.content: The number of $9$-inch parts is $n$. The number of $8$-inch parts is $4n$, and the number of $3$-inch parts is $30$.

steps.title: Write the total count
steps.content: Add the counts of parts, not their lengths: $$ 4n+n+30=100 $$ $$ 5n+30=100 $$ The answer is D.
